289. Revisited Quantification of the Resource Theory of Imaginarity FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yue Han, Naihong Hu
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究了单量子比特和两量子比特系统在不同量子信道下虚数性度量的衰减行为，并扩展了最大虚数态、虚数功率等概念到两量子比特系统。
摘要翻译

本文研究了三种与虚性相关的度量——基于$l_1$范数的虚性度量、虚性鲁棒性及虚性相对熵——在三种典型量子通道（退相位通道、广义振幅阻尼通道及相位-振幅阻尼通道）下，对任意单量子比特纯初始态的衰减行为。进一步，我们将分析扩展至高维系统，通过考察上述虚性度量在双量子比特通道下对几种关键双量子比特态的衰减趋势。同时，我们将最大虚态（最初在虚性资源理论中针对单量子比特定义）的概念推广至可分离的双量子比特态。此外，我们还将单量子比特通道的虚化能力与去虚化能力的定义，扩展至作用于可分离双量子比特态的双量子比特通道。最后，我们计算了几种常见双量子比特通道的虚化能力与去虚化能力。

Abstract

In this paper, we investigate the decay behaviors of three imaginarity-related metrics, specifically the $l_1$-norm-based imaginarity measure, imaginarity robustness, and imaginarity relative entropy, for arbitrary single-qubit pure initial states under three typical quantum channels: dephasing, generalized amplitude damping, and phase-amplitude damping. Furthermore, we extend our analysis to higher-dimensional systems by examining the decay trends of the aforementioned imaginarity metrics for several key two-qubit states under two-qubit channels. We also generalize the concept of the maximal imaginary state (originally defined for single qubits in the resource theory of imaginarity) to separable two-qubit states. In addition, we extend the definitions of imaginary power and de-imaginary power for single-qubit channels to two-qubit channels acting on separable two-qubit states. Finally, we compute the imaginary and de-imaginary powers for several common two-qubit channels.

290. Evidence of Uncollapsed Quantum Amplitudes After Consecutive Measurements FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Christoph Adami, Lambert Giner, Jeff S. Lundeen, Raphael A. Abrahao
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文通过单光子测量实验证明，在连续量子测量中，幺正理论（保留未实现振幅）与塌缩理论（消除未实现振幅）的预测不同，实验结果支持幺正理论并揭示了量子测量的动力学特性。
摘要翻译

量子测量理论中两种最常见的诠释对测量后量子振幅的归宿存在分歧，但这一分歧此前未能产生可通过实验区分的预测。在标准坍缩图景（通常与量子力学的哥本哈根诠释相关联）中，测量会消除未实现的振幅而不留下任何痕迹。相比之下，在幺正理论中，测量设备记录其中一个可能结果的同时，仍作为纠缠态的一部分持续承载着未实现的振幅。这种持续性的存在源于幺正演化的自然特性，因为作为纠缠系统组成部分的测量设备无法作为联合量子态的忠实探针。通过对可调谐量子态进行单光子测量实验，我们证明当对同一量子系统执行三次或以上连续测量时，这两种理论会产生不同的预测。对三次测量联合密度矩阵的分析揭示了其间的相干性，并支持量子测量的幺正理论。当明确引入退相干机制后，目标量子系统与测量设备的联合密度矩阵则变得与坍缩理论的预测相一致。这项工作阐明了连续量子测量的动力学机制，并为量子测量的诠释提供了新的见解。

Abstract

Two of the most common interpretations of quantum measurement disagree about the fate of quantum amplitudes after measurement, yet this disagreement has not previously led to experimentally distinguishable predictions. In the standard collapse picture, commonly linked to the Copenhagen interpretation of quantum mechanics, measurements eliminate unrealized amplitudes without leaving a memory. In contrast, in the unitary theory, the measurement device registers one of the possible outcomes while remaining part of an entangled state that continues to harbor the unrealized amplitudes. This persistence arises naturally under unitary evolution, since a measurement device that is part of an entangled system cannot serve as a faithful probe of the joint quantum state. Using single-photon measurements of a tunable quantum state, we experimentally show that these two theories make different predictions when three or more consecutive measurements are performed on the same quantum system. Analysis of the joint density matrix of the three measurements reveals coherence among them and supports the unitary theory of quantum measurement. When decoherence is explicitly introduced, the joint density matrix of the quantum system of interest and the apparatus becomes consistent with what a collapse theory would predict. This work clarifies the dynamics of consecutive quantum measurements and offers new insights into the interpretation of quantum measurements.

291. Folding-Free Zero-Noise Extrapolation by Layout-induced Noise Diversity FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Debarthi Pal, Yogesh Simmhan
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无需电路折叠的零噪声外推方法（FF-ZNE），通过利用异构硬件布局的噪声多样性来实现可控的噪声放大，从而消除了传统零噪声外推中噪声因子和外推模型选择的需求，在IBM量子设备上验证了该方法对大规模量子电路的有效性和可扩展性。
摘要翻译

近期量子处理器在噪声主导的机制下运行，这推动了无需完全容错即可恢复精确期望值的误差缓解技术的发展。零噪声外推法是一种广泛使用但存在偏差的误差缓解方法，其缺乏严格的误差界限。其有效应用需要复杂的技术选择，尤其是噪声缩放因子和外推模型的选择，这使得ZNE对用户专业知识敏感，并常常需要昂贵的试错流程。本文提出免折叠零噪声外推法，该方法通过在不进行电路折叠的情况下实现有效的噪声放大，从而消除了对噪声因子选择的需求。FF-ZNE利用具有不同原生噪声特征的异构硬件布局，使得固定电路在这些布局上执行时能引起有效噪声强度的可控变化。在去极化噪声模型下，我们通过分析证明所得外推具有固定的线性形式，从而消除了外推器选择的需要，实现了一种无缝且独立于用户的缓解流程。我们进一步提出了两种算法，用于识别一组异构硬件布局，使得给定电路在这些布局上能产生足够差异的期望值，从而实现可靠的零噪声外推。在133量子比特的IBM Quantum设备上的实验表明，对于高达50量子比特的EfficientSU2（稀疏）和哈密顿量模拟（密集）电路，FF-ZNE产生的缓解后期望值平均偏差分别约为6%和4.5%。因此，该方法具有可扩展性，适用于广泛的电路类型。通过消除噪声因子和外推器的选择，FF-ZNE将零噪声外推从一种需要专家调优的技术，转变为适用于当前量子硬件的实用、可扩展且广泛可用的误差缓解方法。

Abstract

Near term quantum processors operate in a noise dominated regime, motivating error mitigation techniques that recover accurate expectation values without full fault tolerance. Zero Noise Extrapolation (ZNE) is a widely used but biased error mitigation method that lacks rigorous error bounds. Its effective application requires nontrivial technical choices, most notably the selection of noise scaling factors and extrapolation models, making ZNE sensitive to user expertise and often necessitating costly trial and error procedures. Here, we introduce Folding Free Zero Noise Extrapolation (FF-ZNE), a method that removes the need for noise factor selection by achieving effective noise amplification without circuit folding. FF-ZNE exploits isomorphic hardware layouts with distinct native noise profiles, such that executing a fixed circuit across these layouts induces controllable variations in the effective noise strength. Under a depolarizing noise model, we analytically show that the resulting extrapolation admits a fixed linear form, eliminating extrapolator choice and enabling a seamless, user independent mitigation procedure. We further propose two algorithms that identify sets of isomorphic hardware layouts on which a given circuit yields sufficiently distinct expectation values to enable reliable zero noise extrapolation. Experiments on a 133 qubit IBM Quantum device demonstrate that FF-ZNE yields mitigated expectation values with average deviations of ~6% and 4.5% for up to 50 qubit EfficientSU2 (sparse) and Hamiltonian simulation (dense) circuits, respectively. The method is thus scalable and applicable to a broad range of circuits. By eliminating noise factor and extrapolator selection, FF-ZNE transforms zero noise extrapolation from a technique requiring expert tuning into a practical, scalable, and broadly accessible error mitigation method for current quantum hardware.

292. Collective Nuclear Polaritons with Coherent and Tunable Excitation Dynamics FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Liufeng Yang, Jinling Wang, Huijun Li, Junhui Cao, Alexey Kavokin, Congjun Wu
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究了通过229Th核系综与真空紫外腔模杂化形成集体核极化激元，实现了可调谐的强耦合动力学和可逆量子存储，展示了核系统中确定性的寿命工程和相干量子存储能力。
摘要翻译

我们提出了一种由²²⁹Th核系综与通过四波混频产生的真空紫外腔模杂化形成的集体核极化激元，实现了按$\sqrt{N}$标度的集体光-物质耦合。在强耦合区域，该系统展现出真空拉比振荡，表明腔光子与核激发之间的杂化。在超辐射区域，存储的激发以协作爆发形式释放，其峰值强度按$N^2$标度增长。发射寿命从数千秒缩短至毫秒量级，并保持可调谐性。通过失谐扫描穿越极化激元的避免交叉能隙，可实现光子激发向集体核激发的绝热转换，从而构建可逆量子存储。我们的研究结果表明，腔介导的核极化激元能够实现核系统中确定性的寿命调控与相干量子存储。

Abstract

We propose collective nuclear polaritons formed by hybridizing a 229Th nuclear ensemble with a vacuum-ultraviolet cavity mode generated via four-wave mixing, achieving a collective light-matter coupling that scales as $\sqrt{N}$. In the strong-coupling regime the system displays vacuum Rabi oscillations, indicating the hybridization between cavity photons and nuclear excitations. In the superradiant regime, the stored excitation is released in a cooperative burst with peak intensity scaling as $N^2$. The emission lifetime shrinks from thousands of seconds to the millisecond scale and remains tunable. Detuning sweeps across the polariton avoided crossing allow adiabatic conversion of the photonic excitation into a collective nuclear excitation, enabling reversible quantum storage. Our results demonstrate that cavity-mediated nuclear polaritons enable deterministic lifetime engineering and coherent quantum storage in nuclear systems.

293. Generalized Inverses of Quantum Channels: a categorical perspective FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Robin Cockett, Jean-Simon Pacaud Lemay, Priyaa Varshinee Srinivasan
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文从范畴论角度研究量子信道的广义逆，证明了Drazin逆总是保迹的，并推广到dagger Drazin逆，为量子误差缓解提供了新的理论工具。
摘要翻译

量子信道被定义为完全正定（CP）且保迹（TP）的映射。尽管并非所有量子信道都是可逆的，但每个量子信道都允许存在多种广义逆，例如穆尔-彭罗斯逆（Moore-Penrose inverse）和德拉任逆（Drazin inverse）。量子信道的广义逆本身未必是量子信道：它通常不满足完全正定性。然而，广义逆在量子误差缓解中仍扮演着重要角色。由于通常希望量子信道的广义逆至少是保迹的，而德拉任逆具有保迹性，穆尔-彭罗斯逆则一般不保迹，因此德拉任逆更受青睐。 本文从范畴论的视角研究量子信道的广义逆。这一框架使我们能够简洁地证明量子信道的德拉任逆总是保迹的，并进一步证明对于幺正量子信道（unital quantum channels），其德拉任逆也是幺正的。随后，我们将这一结果推广至达格-德拉任逆（dagger Drazin inverses），从而表明对于幺正量子信道，穆尔-彭罗斯逆同样兼具保迹性与幺正性。这一发现为德拉任逆和穆尔-彭罗斯逆在量子信息理论，尤其是量子误差缓解中的新应用开辟了道路。

Abstract

A quantum channel is defined as being completely positive (CP) and trace preserving (TP). While not every quantum channel is invertible or reversible, every quantum channel admits various kinds of generalized inverses such as the Moore-Penrose inverse and the Drazin inverse. A generalized inverse of a quantum channel may not itself be a quantum channel: it often fails to be CP. However, generalized inverses still play an important role in quantum error mitigation. Here, because it is often desirable for the generalized inverse of a quantum channel to be at least TP, the Drazin inverse, which is TP, is favoured over the Moore-Penrose inverse, which is not in general TP. In this paper, we take a categorical perspective on generalized inverses of quantum channels. This allows us to give a simple proof of the fact that the Drazin inverse of a quantum channel is always TP. It also allows us to show that for unital quantum channels, the Drazin inverse is also unital. We then generalize this result to dagger Drazin inverses, which allows us to show that for unital quantum channels, the Moore-Penrose inverse is both TP and unital as well. This opens the door to new applications of both the Drazin inverse and Moore-Penrose inverse in quantum information theory and, in particular, in quantum error mitigation.

294. Closed-time-path approach to the optomechanical back-reaction problem FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Salvatore Butera
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文采用闭合时间路径方法研究光力学系统中量子场与运动镜面的相互作用，推导了包含辐射压力反作用的有效作用量，并验证了机械耗散能量与场中产生粒子能量之间的平衡关系。
摘要翻译

我们提出了一种光力学系统的微扰闭时路径（in-in）表述，其中量子场通过辐射压力与运动镜面相互作用。我们推导了描述运动镜面动力学的有效作用量，并包含了腔场的完整反作用效应。这些效应被编码在涨落和耗散核中，我们证明其满足涨落-耗散关系，且其谱结构揭示了与反作用背后物理机制——即动态卡西米尔效应导致的粒子产生——的直接关联。通过推导运动镜面的半经典运动方程，并利用量子场论的in-out形式计算辐射到场中的能量，我们验证了作用于镜面的光学反作用力所耗散的机械能与场中产生粒子所携带能量之间的能量平衡。

Abstract

We present a perturbative closed-time-path (in-in) formulation of an optomechanical system in which a quantum field interacts with a moving mirror via radiation pressure. We derive the effective action governing the dynamics of the moving mirror, incorporating the full back-reaction of the cavity field. These effects are encoded in fluctuation and dissipation kernels, that we show satisfy fluctuation-dissipation relations, and whose spectral structure reveals a direct connection with the underlying physical mechanism responsible for the back-reaction, that is particle creation by the dynamical Casimir effect. By deriving the semiclassical equations of motion for the moving mirror, and computing the energy radiated into the field within the in-out formalism of quantum field theory, we verify the energy balance between the mechanical energy dissipated by the optical back-reaction forces acting on the mirror and the energy carried by the particles created in the field.

295. Investigating Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick Model and Criticality-Enhanced Metrology in a Coherent Ising Machine FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Shuang-Quan Ma, Jing-Yi-Ran Jin, Chen-Rui Fan, Chuan Wang, Qing Ai
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究了使用相干伊辛机模拟Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick模型中的量子临界性，并验证了其在临界点附近能够实现量子增强的计量学精度。
摘要翻译

量子临界性因其显著增强量子传感的能力而受到广泛关注，但它在多体量子系统中的实现与控制仍具挑战性。我们提出了一种利用由简并光学参量振荡器（DOPO）网络构成的相干伊辛机（CIM）来模拟Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick（LMG）模型的有效方案。在我们的工作中，LMG模型的自旋变量被映射到DOPO脉冲的相位上，而自旋-自旋相互作用则通过它们之间的全耦合实现。通过对热力学极限（即$N\rightarrow\infty$）下反铁磁耦合LMG模型中的临界行为及其在临界点附近量子传感中的应用进行研究，我们验证了CIM不仅能有效捕捉临界点处的二阶量子相变（QPT），还能在铁磁耦合下重建其完整的相图。此外，我们展示了如何利用该模拟平台的临界动力学实现量子增强计量学，在LMG模型的临界点附近获得趋于发散的测量精度。这些结果凸显了CIM作为一个灵活的实验平台，在研究基础量子磁性模型中QPT的能力，为量子模拟与临界现象提供了有价值的见解。

Abstract

Quantum criticality has received extensive attention due to its ability to significantly enhance quantum sensing. But its realization and control in many-body quantum systems remain challenging. We present an effective scheme to simulate the Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick (LMG) model using a coherent Ising machine (CIM) composed of a network of degenerate optical parametric oscillators (DOPO). In our work, the spin variables of the LMG model are mapped onto the phases of DOPO pulses, and the spin-spin interactions are realized by all-to-all couplings among them. Through our investigation of the critical behavior in the antiferromagnetically coupled LMG model in the thermodynamic limit, i.e., $N\rightarrow\infty$, and its application in quantum sensing near the critical point, we verify that the CIM does not only effectively capture the second-order quantum phase transition (QPT) at the critical point but also reconstructs its complete phase diagram under ferromagnetic coupling. Furthermore, we demonstrate how the critical dynamics of this simulation platform can be utilized for quantum-enhanced metrology, achieving a measurement precision that diverges near the critical point of the LMG model. These results highlight the capability of the CIM as a flexible experimental platform for investigating the QPT in the fundamental quantum magnetic models, providing valuable insights into quantum simulation and critical phenomena.

296. Kirkwood-Dirac classical states based on discrete Fourier transform: Representation with directed graph FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Lin-Yan Cai, Ying-Hui Yang, Zhu-Jun Zheng
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在离散傅里叶变换下Kirkwood-Dirac经典态的结构特性，通过定义有向图表征任意维度希尔伯特空间中的KD经典纯态，并证明其凸包与线性空间的交集性质。
摘要翻译

Kirkwood-Dirac (KD) 准概率分布是量子态的一种基本表示形式，近年来在量子计量学、量子混沌及弱值等领域得到了广泛应用。若一个量子态的 KD 准概率分布相对于两个给定的基构成一个有效的经典概率分布，则称该态为 KD 经典的，否则称为 KD 非经典的；后者与多种量子过程中的量子优势密切相关。本文研究了当两个正交基之间的转移矩阵取离散傅里叶变换 (DFT) 矩阵形式时，KD 经典态集的结构特征。首先，我们采用一种替代性的解析方法证明：在 $p^r$ 维希尔伯特空间中，KD 经典态集是 KD 经典纯态的凸包——这一结论最近由 De Bi{è}vre 等人 [Annales Henri Poincar{é}, 1-20, 2025] 建立。进一步，我们定义了一个有向图，并利用它来刻画任意维度 $d$ 的希尔伯特空间中的 KD 经典纯态。即，在此有向图中，沿任意从起点到终点的路径上所有 KD 经典纯态的凸包，恰好是 KD 经典态集与由这些路径相关的 KD 经典纯态所张成的线性空间的交集。这一普遍结果不仅可以直接导出 $p^r$ 维情形下的结论，而且涵盖了现有工作 [J. Phys. A, 57, 435303, 2024] 中的定理 2，体现了其一般性与包容性。

Abstract

The Kirkwood-Dirac (KD) quasiprobability distribution is a fundamental representation for quantum states and has been widely applied in quantum metrology, quantum chaos, weak values in recent years. A quantum state is KD-classical if its KD-quasiprobability distribution forms a valid classical probability distribution with respect to two given bases, and KD-nonclassical otherwise, with the latter being closely associated with quantum advantages in various quantum processes. In this work, we investigate the structural characteristics of the KD-classical state set when the transition matrix between two orthonormal bases takes the form of a discrete Fourier transform (DFT) matrix. First, we adopt an alternative analytical approach to prove that the set of KD-classical states in a $p^r$-dimensional Hilbert space is the convex hull of KD-classical pure states--a conclusion that was recently established by De Bi{è}vre et al [Annales Henri Poincar{é}, 1-20, 2025]. Furthermore, we define a directed graph and use it to characterize KD-classical pure states in a Hilbert space of arbitrary dimension $d$. That is, the convex hull of KD-classical pure states along any path from the start vertex to the end vertex in this directed graph is exactly the intersection of the KD-classical state set and the linear space spanned by these path-associated KD-classical pure states. This general result not only yields the $p^r$-dimensional conclusion in a straightforward manner but also encompasses Theorem 2 in the existing work [J. Phys. A, 57, 435303, 2024], demonstrating its generality and inclusiveness.

297. Readout-induced degradation of transmon lifetimes: interplay of TLSs and qubit spectral reshaping FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ziwen Huang, Jimmy Shih-Chun Hung, Mouktik Raha, Ming-Han Chou, Harry Levine, Alex Retzker, Connor T. Hann, David Hover, Fernando G. S. L. Brandão, Aashish A. Clerk, Arbel Haim, Oskar Painter
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 本文研究了超导量子比特在色散读取过程中因测量背作用导致的寿命退化问题，发现该现象源于双能级系统与驱动重整化量子比特谱的相互作用，并通过理论和实验验证了在固定测量速率下，以谐振器基态频率驱动可获得最窄的发射谱和最少的寿命退化，为优化量子处理器读取协议提供了实用指南。
摘要翻译

测量反作用即使在中等驱动强度下也会降低超导量子比特的色散读出性能，通常表现为读出期间量子比特寿命的缩短。本工作通过理论与实验研究了这一退化现象，并揭示了其如何源于失谐双能级系统与驱动重整化的量子比特谱之间的相互作用。在中等至强读出条件下，量子比特发射谱呈现非洛伦兹线型，并对读出驱动频率表现出高度敏感性（即使测量速率保持固定）。我们将读出修正后的量子比特发射谱与含时微扰理论相结合，预测了双能级系统浴存在下的量子比特寿命。主方程模拟及对频率可调传输子器件的实验测量定量验证了这些预测。特别地，我们发现对于固定测量速率，在对应于量子比特基态的谐振腔频率处进行驱动，能产生最窄的量子比特发射谱和最小的寿命退化，这为未来量子处理器中优化读出方案提供了实用指导原则。

Abstract

Measurement backaction degrades dispersive readout of superconducting qubits even at modest drive strengths, often via the reduction of qubit lifetimes during readout. In this work, we theoretically and experimentally study this degradation and show how it can result from the interplay between detuned two-level systems (TLSs) and a drive-renormalized qubit spectrum. For modest to strong readout, the qubit emission spectrum becomes non-Lorentzian and depends sensitively on the readout drive frequency (even when measurement rate is fixed). We combine the readout-modified qubit emission spectrum with time-dependent perturbation theory to predict qubit lifetimes in the presence of a TLS bath. Master equation simulations and experimental measurements on a frequency-tunable transmon confirm these predictions quantitatively. In particular, we find that driving at the resonator frequency associated with the qubit ground state yields the narrowest qubit emission spectrum and the least lifetime degradation for a fixed measurement rate, providing a practical guideline for optimizing readout protocols in future quantum processors.

298. Millimeter Wave Readout of a Superconducting Qubit FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Akash V. Dixit, Zachary L. Parrott, Dennis Chunikhin, Bradley Hauer, Trevyn F. Q. Larson, John D. Teufel
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该研究探索了毫米波光子与超导transmon量子比特的相互作用，用于量子比特读取，通过大失谐抑制不需要的态跃迁，实现了超过99%的测量保真度。
摘要翻译

毫米波正逐渐成为连接和增强不同量子平台（如里德堡原子、光力学系统及超导量子比特）的关键使能技术。本研究聚焦于毫米波光子与常规传输子量子比特之间的相互作用，特别针对量子比特读取应用。我们研究了一个电路量子电动力学系统，该系统包含一个频率为$ω_r = 2π\times 34.7$ GHz的毫米波谐振腔，以及一个频率为$ω_q = 2π\times 3.1$ GHz的传输子量子比特，两者以$g = 2π\times 1.3$ GHz的耦合率相互作用。由于谐振腔与量子比特之间存在巨大失谐（$ω_r/ω_q > 10$），我们能够抑制驱动引起的非期望态跃迁，从而实现对量子比特读取的强驱动。实验表明，在驱动光子数高达$1,000$时未观测到共振态跃迁，并通过使用超过$100$个光子进行量子比特态读取，在无需量子极限放大器辅助的情况下实现了超过99%的测量保真度。

Abstract

Millimeter waves are emerging as an enabling technology for connecting and enhancing different quantum platforms such as Rydberg atoms, optomechanics, and superconducting qubits. In this work, we focus on the interaction between millimeter wave photons and conventional transmon qubits, specifically for qubit readout. We study a circuit quantum electrodynamic (cQED) system consisting of a millimeter-wave cavity at $ω_r = 2π\times 34.7$ GHz and a transmon qubit at $ω_q = 2π\times 3.1$ GHz coupled at rate $g = 2π\times 1.3$ GHz. With such a large detuning between cavity and qubit, $ω_r/ω_q > 10$, we are able to suppress drive induced unwanted state transitions, enabling strong drives for qubit readout. We measure no resonant state transitions up to $1,000$ drive photons and readout the qubit state with more than $100$ photons to achieve a measurement fidelity greater than 99% without the aid of a quantum limited amplifier.

299. Quantum electrometry in a silicon carbide power device FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yuichi Yamazaki, Akira Kiyoi, Naoyuki Kawabata, Yuki Watanabe, Ryosuke Akashi, Shunsuke Daimon, Nobumasa Miyawaki, Yu-ichiro Matsushita, Makoto Kohda, Takeshi Ohshima
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文解决了碳化硅功率器件中高电场检测的难题，通过硅空位量子传感器实现了高分辨率电场映射，可用于器件退化诊断。
摘要翻译

对于碳化硅（SiC）功率器件等高偏压工作器件，早期失效机制的检测对确保可靠性至关重要。这需要一种能以高空间分辨率映射高电场的方法，而该技术至今尚未实现。本文报道了碳化硅中的硅空位（Vsi）在探测高偏压SiC器件内各方向施加电场方面具有卓越特性。Vsi对平行于c轴（Epara）和垂直于c轴（Eperp）的电场分量表现出等效响应，这是量子传感器中独有的特征，且对Epara和Eperp的响应能力使其能够检测尖端SiC功率器件中遇到的各种任意方向电场。我们实现了约2.3 MV/cm的高电场检测，这达到典型载流子浓度4H-SiC击穿电场强度的约90%。选择性形成的Vsi能够实现电场分布的高分辨率映射。基于Vsi的量子传感器为数据驱动的研发方法以及器件退化诊断提供了新途径。

Abstract

For high-bias operation devices such as silicon carbide (SiC) power devices, early detection of failure mechanisms is essential to ensure reliability. This requires a method to map high electric fields with high spatial resolution, which has not been realized until now. Here we report that the silicon vacancy (Vsi) in SiC has outstanding characteristics for detecting electric fields applied in various directions within a high-biased SiC device. Vsi exhibits an equivalent response to electric field components parallel (Epara) and perpendicular (Eperp) to the c-axis, a feature unique among quantum sensors, and the responsiveness to Epara and Eperp enables detection of arbitrary electric fields encountered in cutting-edge SiC power devices. We confirmed high electric field detection of ~2.3 MV/cm, which is ~90% of the breakdown electric field of a 4H-SiC with typical carrier concentration. Selectively formed Vsi enables high-resolution mapping of electric field distribution. Vsi-based quantum sensors bring data-driven research and development methodologies as well as device degradation diagnosis.

300. Electrometry of extremely-low frequencies from kHz to sub-Hz with a Rydberg-atom sensor FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Aveek Chandra, Narongrit Paensin, Rainer Dumke
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文解决了里德堡原子传感器在低频电场测量中的电场屏蔽限制问题，通过结合辅助调制、锁相检测和石蜡涂层气室，实现了0.5 Hz至10 kHz频率范围的电极式宽带电场传感，并将灵敏度提升至2-819 μV/cm/√Hz。
摘要翻译

里德堡原子电场传感技术已展现出从近直流到太赫兹频段的巨大潜力，并在灵敏度、相位提取、多波段接收等关键测量指标上实现了前沿水平。尽管里德堡原子传感器在吉赫兹频段表现出卓越性能，但由于传统蒸气池中的电场屏蔽效应会抑制外部施加的电场，其低频段工作一直面临挑战。我们通过将辅助调制和锁相检测技术与石蜡涂层蒸气池相结合，克服了这一限制，并展示了一种无需电极的宽频带传感方法，其频率覆盖范围从0.5赫兹至10千赫兹。我们的工作将里德堡原子传感器的探测范围扩展至甚低频（VLF）、特低频（ULF）、超低频（SLF）、极低频（ELF）及亚极低频（sub-ELF）频段。该方法实现了当前领先的高灵敏度水平：在1赫兹频率下达到819微伏每厘米每根号赫兹（μV/cm/√Hz），10赫兹时为33 μV/cm/√Hz，100赫兹时为10 μV/cm/√Hz，1千赫兹时为2 μV/cm/√Hz。

Abstract

Rydberg-atom electric field sensing has shown great potential from near-DC to THz with state-of-the-art measurement metrics realized in sensitivity, phase extraction, multi-band receptivity, etc. While Rydberg-atom sensors have shown exceptional performance in the GHz regime, low-frequency operation has remained challenging because of electric-field-screening in conventional vapor cells, which suppresses externally applied fields. We overcome this limitation by combining auxiliary modulation and lock-in detection with a paraffin-coated vapor cell, and demonstrate an electrode-free, wideband method for sensing frequencies, ranging from 0.5 Hz to 10 kHz. Our work extends Rydberg-atom sensor range to VLF, ULF, SLF, ELF and sub-ELF frequency bands. In our method, high state-of-the-art sensitivities have been achieved - 819 $μ$V/cm/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ for 1 Hz, 33 $μ$V/cm/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ for 10 Hz, 10 $μ$V/cm/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ for 100 Hz and 2 $μ$V/cm/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ for 1 kHz.

301. Higher order Magnus expansions for two-level quantum dynamics FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Chen Wei, Frank Großmann
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究了时间依赖两能级系统中Magnus展开的分解方法，并应用于Landau-Zener-Stückelberg-Majorana模型和半经典Rabi模型，发现三阶近似能获得与精确解析结果近乎完美的一致。
摘要翻译

我们研究了单轴驱动下一般含时二能级系统的马格努斯展开。借助\(\mathfrak{su}(2)\)李代数，该展开式被分解为无对易子形式。为说明所得表达式的实用性，我们重新审视了朗道-齐纳-施特克尔贝格-马约拉纳模型，重点关注非绝热跃迁及斯托克斯相位。此外，通过确定不同阶次的弗洛凯准能，我们系统处理了半经典拉比模型。我们展示了如何运用适当的绘景变换，以及如何利用底层模型的对称性来保证展开式的收敛性，并与精确结果达成令人满意的一致。对于所研究的两个模型，结果表明三阶近似给出的结果与精确解析解近乎完全吻合。出乎意料的是，在半经典拉比模型的情形下，即使在绝热绘景中采用二阶马格努斯近似，也能在整个参数范围内得到几乎精确的结果。

Abstract

We investigate the Magnus expansion for a generic time-dependent two-level system under single-axis driving. By virtue of the \(\mathfrak{su}(2)\) Lie algebra, the expansion is decomposed into a commutator-free form. To illustrate the usefulness of the gained expression, we then revisit the Landau-Zener-Stückelberg-Majorana model, with a focus on non-adiabatic transitions as well as the Stokes phase. In addition, the semiclassical Rabi model is systematically treated by determining the Floquet quasienergy up to different orders. We demonstrate how to employ suitable picture transformations as well as on how to enforce the symmetry of the underlying model in order to guarantee convergence of the expansion as well as to achieve satisfactory agreement with the exact results. For both models that we studied it turns out that a third order approximation yields results that are in next to perfect agreement with exact analytical ones. Surprisingly, in the case of the semiclassical Rabi model, even the second order Magnus approximation in the adiabatic picture produces almost exact results over the whole parameter range.

302. A Highly Sensitive Diamond NV Magnetometer Using Ramsey Interferometry with a Short Sensor-to-Sample Distance FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yuta Araki, Takeharu Sekiguchi, Yuji Hatano, Naota Sekiguchi, Chikara Shinei, Masashi Miyakawa, Takashi Taniguchi, Tokuyuki Teraji, Hiroshi Abe, Shinobu Onoda, Takeshi Ohshima, Takayuki Shibata, Mutsuko Hatano, Takayuki Iwasaki
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该研究开发了一种基于Ramsey干涉测量和短传感距离的金刚石量子磁力计，实现了高灵敏度（2.93 pT/√Hz）和低热效应，成功测量了模拟脑磁图信号的微弱磁场（77.7 pT）。
摘要翻译

本研究开发了一种基于拉姆齐干涉测量技术、具有短传感距离的金刚石量子磁强计。传统采用连续波光探测磁共振与拉姆齐方法的系综氮空位中心生物磁传感器通常依赖瓦级激光以实现高灵敏度，由此引发热效应问题。相比之下，我们通过对电子束辐照处理的高温高压金刚石样品采用光捕获金刚石波导技术，获得了9.5%的高光子转换效率，从而在210 mW的低激光功率下，同时实现了100-400 Hz频率范围内2.93(7) pT/Hz^1/2的高灵敏度以及仅约13 K的微弱温升。利用模拟脑磁图信号的干燥仿体，我们在2.5 mm的传感距离下无需信号平均即测量到77.7(2) pT的微弱磁场。这种近距离测量避免了严重的空间信号衰减，从而获得高信噪比。本项进展对于实现基于拉姆齐干涉测量的实用化生物磁应用具有重要意义。

Abstract

In this study, we developed a diamond quantum magnetometer based on Ramsey interferometry with a short sensor-to-sample distance. Conventional biomagnetic sensors with ensemble nitrogen-vacancy centers using continuous-wave optically detected magnetic resonance and Ramsey methods typically rely on watt-level lasers to achieve high sensitivity, resulting in thermal issues. In contrast, by employing the light-trapping diamond waveguide technique in a high-pressure and high-temperature diamond sample treated with electron beam irradiation, we obtained a high photon conversion efficiency of 9.5%, enabling us to simultaneously achieve a high sensitivity of 2.93(7) pT/Hz^1/2 in the 100-400 Hz frequency range and a minimal temperature increase of only approximately 13 K at a low laser power of 210 mW. Using a dry phantom designed to mimic magnetoencephalography signals, we measured a weak magnetic field of 77.7(2) pT without signal averaging at a sensor-to-sample distance of 2.5 mm. This short-distance measurement prevents severe spatial signal attenuation, yielding a high signal-to-noise ratio. The development here is crucial for practical biomagnetic applications based on Ramsey interferometry.

303. Make it SING: Analyzing Semantic Invariants in Classifiers FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Harel Yadid, Meir Yossef Levi, Roy Betser, Guy Gilboa
Published: 2026-03-15
TL;DR: 本文提出了SING方法，用于分析和解释深度神经网络分类器中零空间不变性的语义内容，发现不同架构（如ResNet50和DinoViT）在保持类别语义方面存在差异。
摘要翻译

所有分类器（包括最先进的视觉模型）都具有不变性，这种特性部分源于其线性映射的几何结构。这些不变性存在于分类器的零空间中，会诱导产生映射到相同输出的等效输入集。由于现有方法难以提供人类可解释的信息，这些不变性的语义内容仍不明确。为填补这一空白，我们提出“零空间几何语义解释”（SING）方法，该方法能针对网络构建等效图像，并对可用的变化赋予语义解释。我们利用从网络特征到多模态视觉语言模型的映射，从而获得自然语言描述及所诱导语义转换的视觉示例。SING可应用于单张图像以揭示局部不变性，亦可应用于图像集，从而在类别和模型层面进行广泛的统计分析。例如，我们的方法表明ResNet50会将相关语义属性泄露至零空间，而基于自监督DINO预训练的视觉Transformer模型DinoViT在保持不变空间中的类别语义方面表现更优。

Abstract

All classifiers, including state-of-the-art vision models, possess invariants, partially rooted in the geometry of their linear mappings. These invariants, which reside in the null-space of the classifier, induce equivalent sets of inputs that map to identical outputs. The semantic content of these invariants remains vague, as existing approaches struggle to provide human-interpretable information. To address this gap, we present Semantic Interpretation of the Null-space Geometry (SING), a method that constructs equivalent images, with respect to the network, and assigns semantic interpretations to the available variations. We use a mapping from network features to multi-modal vision language models. This allows us to obtain natural language descriptions and visual examples of the induced semantic shifts. SING can be applied to a single image, uncovering local invariants, or to sets of images, allowing a breadth of statistical analysis at the class and model levels. For example, our method reveals that ResNet50 leaks relevant semantic attributes to the null space, whereas DinoViT, a ViT pretrained with self-supervised DINO, is superior in maintaining class semantics across the invariant space.

304. Experimental Evaluation of Security Attacks on Self-Driving Car Platforms FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Viet K. Nguyen, Nathan Lee, Mohammad Husain
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文系统评估了五种安全攻击（FGSM、PGD、中间人、拒绝服务和幻影攻击）对低成本自动驾驶汽车平台的影响，发现不同攻击类型在控制偏差、计算成本和运行时响应性方面产生可区分的“指纹”，为攻击感知监控系统和基于签名的防御机制提供了基础。
摘要翻译

基于深度学习的自动驾驶地面车辆感知系统易受对抗性操纵与网络层干扰的攻击。本文对五类攻击——快速梯度符号法（FGSM）、投影梯度下降（PGD）、中间人（MitM）、拒绝服务（DoS）及幻影攻击——在低成本自动驾驶平台（JetRacer与Yahboom）上进行了系统化的硬件实验评估。通过标准化的13秒实验协议与全面的自动化日志记录，我们系统刻画了攻击行为的三维特征：（i）控制偏差，（ii）计算成本，以及（iii）运行时响应性。分析表明，不同攻击类别在这些维度上产生一致且可区分的“指纹”：感知攻击（MitM输出操纵与幻影投影）产生高转向偏差特征且计算开销正常；PGD在多维度上同时产生转向扰动与计算负载特征；而DoS则表现为帧率与延迟退化特征，且对控制平面的扰动最小。我们证明该指纹识别框架可泛化至数字攻击（对抗性扰动、网络操纵）与环境攻击（投影虚假特征），为构建攻击感知监控系统及基于特征的有针对性防御机制奠定了基础。

Abstract

Deep learning-based perception pipelines in autonomous ground vehicles are vulnerable to both adversarial manipulation and network-layer disruption. We present a systematic, on-hardware experimental evaluation of five attack classes: FGSM, PGD, man-in-the-middle (MitM), denial-of-service (DoS), and phantom attacks on low-cost autonomous vehicle platforms (JetRacer and Yahboom). Using a standardized 13-second experimental protocol and comprehensive automated logging, we systematically characterize three dimensions of attack behavior:(i) control deviation, (ii) computational cost, and (iii) runtime responsiveness. Our analysis reveals that distinct attack classes produce consistent and separable "fingerprints" across these dimensions: perception attacks (MitM output manipulation and phantom projection) generate high steering deviation signatures with nominal computational overhead, PGD produces combined steering perturbation and computational load signatures across multiple dimensions, and DoS exhibits frame rate and latency degradation signatures with minimal control-plane perturbation. We demonstrate that our fingerprinting framework generalizes across both digital attacks (adversarial perturbations, network manipulation) and environmental attacks (projected false features), providing a foundation for attack-aware monitoring systems and targeted, signature-based defense mechanisms.

305. Scribe Verification in Chinese manuscripts using Siamese, Triplet, and Vision Transformer Neural Networks FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Dimitrios-Chrysovalantis Liakopoulos, Yanbo Zhang, Chongsheng Zhang, Constantine Kotropoulos
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文研究使用深度度量学习方法（包括Siamese、Triplet和Vision Transformer网络）来自动验证中国手稿是否由同一抄写员书写，实验结果表明基于MobileNetV3的Siamese模型在对比损失训练下在两个数据集上取得了最佳或次佳的整体准确率和ROC曲线下面积。
摘要翻译

本文研究了中文手稿笔迹验证的深度学习模型，即利用深度度量学习方法自动判断两份手稿残片是否出自同一抄写员之手。研究采用两个数据集：清华简数据集，以及从多属性中国书法数据集中选取的、聚焦于样本量较大书法家的子集。实验实现了孪生网络与三元组神经网络架构，包括卷积模型和基于Transformer的模型。实验结果表明，采用对比损失训练的MobileNetV3+定制孪生网络模型在两个数据集上均取得了最佳或次优的整体准确率与受试者工作特征曲线下面积。

Abstract

The paper examines deep learning models for scribe verification in Chinese manuscripts. That is, to automatically determine whether two manuscript fragments were written by the same scribe using deep metric learning methods. Two datasets were used: the Tsinghua Bamboo Slips Dataset and a selected subset of the Multi-Attribute Chinese Calligraphy Dataset, focusing on the calligraphers with a large number of samples. Siamese and Triplet neural network architectures are implemented, including convolutional and Transformer-based models. The experimental results show that the MobileNetV3+ Custom Siamese model trained with contrastive loss achieves either the best or the second-best overall accuracy and area under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve on both datasets.

306. D-Compress: Detail-Preserving LiDAR Range Image Compression for Real-Time Streaming on Resource-Constrained Robots FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Shengqian Wang, Chang Tu, He Chen
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为D-Compress的LiDAR范围图像压缩框架，解决了现有压缩方法在实时流传输中几何细节丢失和动态带宽下率失真优化不足的问题，在保持几何精度和下游任务性能的同时实现了超过100倍的压缩比和实时执行。
摘要翻译

高效的三维激光雷达点云压缩与流传输对于边缘服务器辅助的机器人系统至关重要，它能够通过紧凑的数据表示实现实时通信。一种广泛采用的方法是将激光雷达点云表示为距离图像，从而可以直接使用成熟的图像与视频压缩编解码器。然而，由于这些编解码器在设计时以人类视觉感知为导向，它们常常会牺牲几何细节，从而降低了如建图和目标检测等下游机器人任务的性能。此外，在动态带宽条件下，基于率失真优化的码率控制方法在距离图像压缩领域仍未得到充分探索。为应对这些局限，我们提出了D-Compress，一种专为实时流传输设计的、能够保留细节且快速的距离图像压缩新框架。D-Compress将帧内与帧间预测与自适应离散小波变换方法相结合，以实现精确的残差压缩。此外，我们通过新的率失真建模，为距离图像压缩引入了一种基于率失真优化的新型码率控制算法。在多个数据集上的广泛评估表明，D-Compress具有显著优势，其在几何精度和下游任务性能上均优于当前最先进的压缩方法，尤其在压缩比超过100倍时表现突出，同时能在资源受限的硬件上保持实时运行。此外，在动态带宽条件下的评估验证了其码率控制机制的鲁棒性。

Abstract

Efficient 3D LiDAR point cloud compression (LPCC) and streaming are critical for edge server-assisted robotic systems, enabling real-time communication with compact data representations. A widely adopted approach represents LiDAR point clouds as range images, enabling the direct use of mature image and video compression codecs. However, because these codecs are designed with human visual perception in mind, they often compromise geometric details, which downgrades the performance of downstream robotic tasks such as mapping and object detection. Furthermore, rate-distortion optimization (RDO)-based rate control remains largely underexplored for range image compression (RIC) under dynamic bandwidth conditions. To address these limitations, we propose D-Compress, a new detail-preserving and fast RIC framework tailored for real-time streaming. D-Compress integrates both intra- and inter-frame prediction with an adaptive discrete wavelet transform approach for precise residual compression. Additionally, we introduce a new RDO-based rate control algorithm for RIC through new rate-distortion modeling. Extensive evaluations on various datasets demonstrate the superiority of D-Compress, which outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) compression methods in both geometric accuracy and downstream task performance, particularly at compression ratios exceeding 100x, while maintaining real-time execution on resource-constrained hardware. Moreover, evaluations under dynamic bandwidth conditions validate the robustness of its rate control mechanism.

307. DQ-Ladder: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Bitrate Ladder for Adaptive Video Streaming FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Reza Farahani, Zoha Azimi, Vignesh V Menon, Hermann Hellwagner, Radu Prodan, Schahram Dustdar, Christian Timmerer
Published: 2026-03-13
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的比特率阶梯优化方法DQ-Ladder，用于自适应视频流应用，相比传统方法在保持视频质量的同时显著降低了比特率和解码时间。
摘要翻译

基于HTTP的自适应分块视频流传输通常依赖于预定义的码率-分辨率组合集，即码率阶梯。然而，固定阶梯往往忽略内容特性与解码复杂度的差异，导致编码时间、解码效率与视频质量之间的权衡未能达到最优。本文提出DQ-Ladder，一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方案，用于为自适应视频流应用构建时间与质量感知的码率阶梯。DQ-Ladder以每个视频块的预测解码时间、质量分数和码率等级作为深度Q网络（DQN）智能体的输入，并通过解码时间、视频质量与分辨率平滑度的加权奖励函数进行引导。我们利用机器学习模型预测解码时间、码率等级及客观质量指标（VMAF、XPSNR），从而无需进行耗尽的编码或质量指标计算。我们使用通用视频编码（VVC）工具链（VVenC/VVdeC）在750个视频序列上对DQ-Ladder进行评估，涵盖六种符合苹果HLS标准的分辨率与41个量化参数。与四种基准方法的实验对比表明，相较于HLS阶梯，DQ-Ladder在XPSNR上实现了至少10.3%的BD-rate节省，同时降低了解码时间22%。DQ-Ladder对预测误差的敏感性显著低于竞争方法，即使在高达20%的噪声干扰下仍保持稳健性。

Abstract

Adaptive streaming of segmented video over HTTP typically relies on a predefined set of bitrate-resolution pairs, known as a bitrate ladder. However, fixed ladders often overlook variations in content and decoding complexities, leading to suboptimal trade-offs between encoding time, decoding efficiency, and video quality. This article introduces DQ-Ladder, a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based scheme for constructing time- and quality-aware bitrate ladders for adaptive video streaming applications. DQ-Ladder employs predicted decoding time, quality scores, and bitrate levels per segment as inputs to a Deep Q-Network (DQN) agent, guided by a weighted reward function of decoding time, video quality, and resolution smoothness. We leverage machine learning models to predict decoding time, bitrate level, and objective quality metrics (VMAF, XPSNR), eliminating the need for exhaustive encoding or quality metric computation. We evaluate DQ-Ladder using the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) toolchain (VVenC/VVdeC) on 750 video sequences across six Apple HLS-compliant resolutions and 41 quantization parameters. Experimental results against four baselines show that DQ-Ladder achieves BD-rate reductions of at least 10.3% for XPSNR compared to the HLS ladder, while reducing decoding time by 22%. DQ-Ladder shows significantly lower sensitivity to prediction errors than competing methods, remaining robust even with up to 20% noise.

308. Anchor Forcing: Anchor Memory and Tri-Region RoPE for Interactive Streaming Video Diffusion FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yang Yang, Tianyi Zhang, Wei Huang, Jinwei Chen, Boxi Wu, Xiaofei He, Deng Cai, Bo Li, Peng-Tao Jiang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文针对交互式长视频生成中提示切换导致的感知质量下降和运动动态减弱问题，提出了Anchor Forcing框架，通过锚点引导的重新缓存机制和三区域RoPE设计，有效提升了生成视频的感知质量和运动连贯性。
摘要翻译

交互式长视频生成需要通过提示词切换来引入新主体或事件，同时需在长时间跨度内保持感知保真度与连贯运动。近期蒸馏式流式视频扩散模型通过复用滚动KV缓存实现长序列生成，并能在每次提示切换时通过重新缓存实现交互。然而，现有流式方法仍存在渐进式质量退化与运动动态减弱的问题。我们识别出交互式流式生成中两种特有的失效模式：（一）在每次提示切换时，当前缓存维护机制无法同时保留基于KV的语义上下文与近期潜在线索，导致边界条件作用弱化及感知质量下降；（二）在蒸馏过程中，无边界的时间索引会引发位置分布偏移——偏离预训练主干网络的有界RoPE机制，从而削弱预训练运动先验与长时程运动保持能力。为解决这些问题，我们提出**锚点强制**这一以缓存为核心的双重设计框架。首先，锚点引导的重新缓存机制将KV状态存储于锚点缓存中，并在每次提示切换时从这些锚点热启动重新缓存过程，以此减少切换后的证据损失并稳定感知质量。其次，采用具有区域特定参考原点的三区域RoPE，配合RoPE重对齐蒸馏技术，将无边界流式索引与预训练RoPE机制相协调，从而更好地保持运动先验。长视频实验表明，在交互式场景中，本方法在感知质量与运动指标上均优于现有流式基线模型。项目页面：https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/Anchor-Forcing

Abstract

Interactive long video generation requires prompt switching to introduce new subjects or events, while maintaining perceptual fidelity and coherent motion over extended horizons. Recent distilled streaming video diffusion models reuse a rolling KV cache for long-range generation, enabling prompt-switch interaction through re-cache at each switch. However, existing streaming methods still exhibit progressive quality degradation and weakened motion dynamics. We identify two failure modes specific to interactive streaming generation: (i) at each prompt switch, current cache maintenance cannot simultaneously retain KV-based semantic context and recent latent cues, resulting in weak boundary conditioning and reduced perceptual quality; and (ii) during distillation, unbounded time indexing induces a positional distribution shift from the pretrained backbone's bounded RoPE regime, weakening pretrained motion priors and long-horizon motion retention. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{Anchor Forcing}, a cache-centric framework with two designs. First, an anchor-guided re-cache mechanism stores KV states in anchor caches and warm-starts re-cache from these anchors at each prompt switch, reducing post-switch evidence loss and stabilizing perceptual quality. Second, a tri-region RoPE with region-specific reference origins, together with RoPE re-alignment distillation, reconciles unbounded streaming indices with the pretrained RoPE regime to better retain motion priors. Experiments on long videos show that our method improves perceptual quality and motion metrics over prior streaming baselines in interactive settings. Project page: https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/Anchor-Forcing

309. A multiscale discrete-to-continuum framework for structured population models FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Eleonora Agostinelli, Keith L. Chambers, Helen M. Byrne, Mohit P. Dalwadi
Published: 2026-03-16
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种多尺度离散到连续框架，用于系统地从结构化种群模型中推导出连续近似，并以早期动脉粥样硬化的脂质结构模型为例验证了该方法的有效性。
摘要翻译

生物种群数学模型通常采用离散结构类来捕捉个体间的性状差异（如年龄、尺寸、表型、细胞内状态）。将这些离散模型升尺度为连续描述可提升解析处理能力与数值解的可扩展性。然而，仅基于泰勒展开的传统升尺度方法可能在截断阶数、一致有效性及边界条件方面引入模糊性。为此，本文提出一种离散多尺度框架，以系统性地推导结构化种群模型的连续近似。通过将多尺度方法与匹配渐近展开法应用于离散系统，我们识别了结构空间中适合连续描述的区域，并推导出相应的偏微分方程。主导阶动力学在主体区域表现为非线性平流方程，而在前沿波与停滞点附近的小内层区域则呈现平流-扩散过程。对于连续描述本质上不适用的区域，我们进一步推导了离散边界层描述。最后，我们以早期动脉粥样硬化的简单脂质结构模型为例演示该方法，并验证离散与连续描述间的一致性。所提出的多尺度框架可应用于其他具有离散结构的异质系统，从而获得具有渐近一致边界条件的恰当升尺度动力学。

Abstract

Mathematical models of biological populations commonly use discrete structure classes to capture trait variation among individuals (e.g. age, size, phenotype, intracellular state). Upscaling these discrete models into continuum descriptions can improve analytical tractability and scalability of numerical solutions. Common upscaling approaches based solely on Taylor expansions may, however, introduce ambiguities in truncation order, uniform validity and boundary conditions. To address this, here we introduce a discrete multiscale framework to systematically derive continuum approximations of structured population models. Using the method of multiple scales and matched asymptotic expansions applied to discrete systems, we identify regions of structure space for which a continuum representation is appropriate and derive the corresponding partial differential equations. The leading-order dynamics are given by a nonlinear advection equation in the bulk domain and advection-diffusion processes in small inner layers about the leading wavefronts and stagnation point. We further derive discrete boundary layer descriptions for regions where a continuum representation is fundamentally inappropriate. Finally, we demonstrate the method on a simple lipid-structured model for early atherosclerosis and verify consistency between the discrete and continuum descriptions. The multiscale framework we present can be applied to other heterogeneous systems with discrete structure in order to obtain appropriate upscaled dynamics with asymptotically consistent boundary conditions.

310. Open Biomedical Knowledge Graphs at Scale: Construction, Federation, and AI Agent Access with Samyama Graph Database FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Madhulatha Mandarapu, Sandeep Kunkunuru
Published: 2026-03-16
TL;DR: 该论文解决了生物医学知识分散在多个孤立数据库中的问题，通过构建两个开源生物医学知识图谱并实现跨图谱联邦查询和LLM智能体自然语言访问，使研究人员能够高效回答跨领域复杂查询。
摘要翻译

生物医学知识分散在各自独立的数据库中——Reactome存储通路数据，STRING存储蛋白质相互作用，基因本体论（Gene Ontology）存储功能注释，ClinicalTrials.gov存储研究注册信息，此外还有数十个其他来源。研究人员通常需要从每个来源下载平面文件，并编写定制化脚本进行交叉引用，这一过程缓慢、易错且难以复现。我们提出了两个开源生物医学知识图谱——通路知识图谱（Pathways KG，整合5个来源，包含118,686个节点和834,785条边）和临床试验知识图谱（Clinical Trials KG，整合5个来源，包含7,774,446个节点和26,973,997条边）——它们构建于Samyama之上，这是一个用Rust编写的高性能图数据库。 我们的贡献体现在三个方面。首先，我们描述了一种可复现的ETL（提取、转换、加载）模式，用于从异构公共数据源构建大规模知识图谱，该模式具备跨源去重、批量Cypher加载和便携式快照导出功能。其次，我们展示了跨知识图谱的联邦查询能力：将两个快照加载到同一个图租户中，即可实现跨数据集的基于属性的连接，从而回答诸如“哪些生物通路被目前处于乳腺癌三期试验的药物所干扰？”这类问题——这是任一独立知识图谱都无法单独回答的查询。第三，我们引入了模式驱动的MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器生成机制：每个知识图谱能通过模型上下文协议自动为LLM智能体提供类型化工具，从而实现无需手动编写工具的自然语言图查询访问。 所有数据源均为开放许可（CC BY 4.0、CC0、OBO）。快照、ETL代码和MCP配置均已公开。在商用硬件（Mac Mini M4，16GB内存）上，合并后的联邦图谱（789万个节点，2780万条边）加载仅需76秒，而标志性的跨知识图谱查询——“哪些通路被乳腺癌三期试验中的药物所干扰？”——可在2.1秒内返回经过验证的结果。

Abstract

Biomedical knowledge is fragmented across siloed databases -- Reactome for pathways, STRING for protein interactions, Gene Ontology for functional annotations, ClinicalTrials.gov for study registries, and dozens more. Researchers routinely download flat files from each source and write bespoke scripts to cross-reference them, a process that is slow, error-prone, and not reproducible. We present two open-source biomedical knowledge graphs -- Pathways KG (118,686 nodes, 834,785 edges from 5 sources) and Clinical Trials KG (7,774,446 nodes, 26,973,997 edges from 5 sources) -- built on Samyama, a high-performance graph database written in Rust. Our contributions are threefold. First, we describe a reproducible ETL pattern for constructing large-scale KGs from heterogeneous public data sources, with cross-source deduplication, batch Cypher loading, and portable snapshot export. Second, we demonstrate cross-KG federation: loading both snapshots into a single graph tenant enables property-based joins across datasets, answering questions like ``Which biological pathways are disrupted by drugs currently in Phase~3 trials for breast cancer?'' -- a query that neither KG can answer alone. Third, we introduce schema-driven MCP server generation: each KG automatically exposes typed tools for LLM agents via the Model Context Protocol, enabling natural-language access to graph queries without manual tool authoring. All data sources are open-license (CC~BY~4.0, CC0, OBO). Snapshots, ETL code, and MCP configurations are publicly available. The combined federated graph (7.89M nodes, 27.8M edges) loads in 76 seconds on commodity hardware (Mac Mini M4, 16GB RAM), and the signature cross-KG query -- ``which pathways are disrupted by drugs in Phase~3 breast cancer trials?'' -- returns validated results in 2.1 seconds.

311. Fold-CP: A Context Parallelism Framework for Biomolecular Modeling FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Dejun Lin, Simon Chu, Vishanth Iyer, Youhan Lee, John St John, Kevin Boyd, Brian Roland, Xiaowei Ren, Guoqing Zhou, Zhonglin Cao, Polina Binder, Yuliya Zhautouskaya, Jakub Zakrzewski, Maximilian Stadler, Kyle Gion, Yuxing Peng, Xi Chen, Tianjing Zhang, Philipp Junk, Michelle Dimon, Paweł Gniewek, Fabian Ortega, McKinley Polen, Ivan Grubisic, Ali Bashir, Graham Holt, Danny Kovtun, Matthias Grass, Luca Naef, Rui Wang, Jian Peng, Anthony Costa, Saee Paliwal, Eddie Calleja, Timur Rvachov, Neha Tadimeti, Roy Tal, Emine Kucukbenli
Published: 2026-03-16
TL;DR: 本文提出了Fold-CP并行计算框架，解决了大规模生物分子组装体结构预测中的内存限制问题，实现了超过30,000个残基的蛋白质复合物建模。
摘要翻译

理解细胞机制需要对大型生物分子组装体进行原子尺度重构。然而，预测这些系统的结构一直受到如AlphaFold 3等模型硬件内存需求的限制，使得在单个GPU上可处理的残基数存在数千个的实际上限。本文介绍NVIDIA BioNeMo Fold-CP，一种上下文并行框架，它通过将共折叠模型的推理和训练流程分布到多个GPU上，克服了这一障碍。我们采用Boltz模型作为开源参考架构，并实现了自定义多维原语，能够高效并行化密集三角更新以及窗口批处理局部注意力中不规则且数据依赖的模式。我们的方法实现了高效的内存扩展；对于一个分布在P个GPU上的N个标记输入，每个设备的内存扩展为$O(N^2/P)$，从而能够在64个NVIDIA B300 GPU上预测超过30,000个残基的组装体结构。我们通过成功的开发者用例展示了该方法的科学实用性：Fold-CP实现了对哺乳动物蛋白质复合物综合资源数据库超过90%条目的评分，并成功折叠了与疾病相关的PI4KA脂质激酶复合体及其结合的无序区域，且无需截断处理。通过为建模具有完整全局上下文的大规模系统提供可扩展的途径，Fold-CP代表了向实现虚拟细胞迈出的重要一步。

Abstract

Understanding cellular machinery requires atomic-scale reconstruction of large biomolecular assemblies. However, predicting the structures of these systems has been constrained by hardware memory requirements of models like AlphaFold 3, imposing a practical ceiling of a few thousand residues that can be processed on a single GPU. Here we present NVIDIA BioNeMo Fold-CP, a context parallelism framework that overcomes this barrier by distributing the inference and training pipelines of co-folding models across multiple GPUs. We use the Boltz models as open source reference architectures and implement custom multidimensional primitives that efficiently parallelize both the dense triangular updates and the irregular, data-dependent pattern of window-batched local attention. Our approach achieves efficient memory scaling; for an N-token input distributed across P GPUs, per-device memory scales as $O(N^2/P)$, enabling the structure prediction of assemblies exceeding 30,000 residues on 64 NVIDIA B300 GPUs. We demonstrate the scientific utility of this approach through successful developer use cases: Fold-CP enabled the scoring of over 90% of Comprehensive Resource of Mammalian protein complexes (CORUM) database, as well as folding of disease-relevant PI4KA lipid kinase complex bound to an intrinsically disordered region without cropping. By providing a scalable pathway for modeling massive systems with full global context, Fold-CP represents a significant step toward the realization of a virtual cell.

biomolecular modeling, protein structure prediction, context parallelism, GPU memory scaling, AlphaFold 3, co-folding models, large biomolecular assemblies, virtual cell

312. Countershading coloration in blue shark skin emerges from hierarchically organized and spatially tuned photonic architectures inside skin denticles FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Viktoriia Kamska, Emeline Raguin, Bodo D. Wilts, Luca Bertinetti, Chiara Micheletti, Clemens Schmitt, Shahrouz Amini, Maria Murace, Frederik H. Mollen, Michael Blumer, Maite Erauskin Extramiana, Ruien Hu, Stefan Redl, Mason N. Dean
Published: 2026-03-14
TL;DR: 该论文揭示了蓝鲨的伪装着色并非来自真皮色素细胞，而是由皮肤齿状体内部的分层光子结构（包括微米级细胞组织和纳米级晶体排列）产生的光学效应。
摘要翻译

蓝鲨（Prionace glauca）呈现出显著的背腹颜色梯度，从背部鲜艳的蓝色过渡到腹部的银白色，这种模式被广泛解释为远洋反荫蔽。尽管其生态意义重大，但这种色彩形成的物理基础仍未得到解决。本文揭示，该色彩系统并非像大多数脊椎动物那样源于真皮色素细胞，而是源自覆盖皮肤的单个真皮小齿髓腔内一种先前未被识别的光子结构。光学成像显示小齿冠部存在离散的颜色区域，而外部小齿形态在不同颜色区域间保持相似。通过光谱学、显微计算机断层扫描、组织学及相关电子显微镜技术，我们证明颜色变化是由相互耦合的微米级和纳米级结构共同调控的。在蓝色小齿中，虹彩细胞和黑色素细胞在扩大的、局限于冠部的髓腔内形成一个密集镶嵌的反射-吸收系统。过渡区小齿表现出部分细胞分层结构，而白色小齿则缺乏黑色素细胞，仅包含反射细胞。在纳米尺度上，有序排列的嘌呤晶体堆栈产生窄带蓝色反射，而无序组装则产生宽带白色散射。综上所述，这些结果表明小齿是受机械保护的光学“像素”，其层级化的细胞和纳米晶体结构共同产生了鲨鱼的反荫蔽体色。

Abstract

The blue shark (Prionace glauca) exhibits a striking dorsoventral color gradient, transitioning from vibrant blue dorsally to silver and white ventrally, a pattern widely interpreted as pelagic countershading. Despite its ecological significance, the physical basis of this coloration remains unresolved. Here we show that this color system does not arise from dermal chromatophores, as in most vertebrates, but from a previously unrecognised photonic architecture housed within the pulp cavity of individual dermal denticles that cover the skin. Optical imaging reveals discrete color domains within denticle crowns, while external denticle morphology remains similar across color zones. Using spectroscopy, micro-computed tomography, histology, and correlative electron microscopy, we demonstrate that color variation is organized across coupled micro- and nanoscale architectures. In blue denticles, iridophores and melanophores form a densely packed tessellated reflector-absorber system within an expanded crown-restricted pulp cavity. Transition-zone denticles exhibit partial cellular layering, whereas white denticles lack melanophores and contain only reflective cells. At the nanoscale, ordered purine-crystal stacks generate narrowband blue reflection, whereas disordered assemblies produce broadband white scattering. Together, these results reveal denticles as mechanically protected optical "pixels" whose hierarchical cellular and nanocrystal organization generates the shark's countershaded coloration.

评分理由: 该论文研究蓝鲨皮肤中基于皮肤齿状体光子结构的伪装着色机制，属于生物物理学、材料科学和动物学领域。论文使用光学成像、光谱学、显微CT、组织学和电子显微镜等方法，研究鲨鱼皮肤的颜色产生原理，与医学图像分析、人工智能、临床决策支持、疾病诊断、手术规划等医疗领域完全无关。所有关键词均涉及医疗应用，而本文是基础生物学研究，因此所有相关度评分为0。

关键词

blue shark, countershading coloration, dermal denticles, photonic architecture, purine-crystal stacks, optical imaging, micro-computed tomography, hierarchical organization
